title: Run final verification across all phases
description: Execute final verification: all tests pass, clippy clean, UI builds, all endpoints functional, all runbooks exist.

title: Consolidate all runbooks into index
description: Create RUNBOOK_INDEX.md linking all phase runbooks with quick reference commands and escalation paths.

title: Create final handover document
description: Create HANDOVER.md with complete project status, artifact inventory, known issues, and next steps.

title: Publish parity artifacts
description: Ensure all parity artifacts are complete: crosswalks, scorecards, runbooks, gating documents, tickets.

title: Conduct governance review
description: Final governance review: verify all gates passed, charter active, cadence established, audit trail complete.

title: Phase 10 gate review
description: Run gate review against criteria 10.1-10.3. Document results in phase10_gating.md. Final sign-off.
